{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113594353D5A596BFA7EFEC369D"}"},"total":17},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7607054631756038974","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错，文笔虽然有些平淡但是叙事的用词非常标准！也是非常牛逼克拉斯好吧！[笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771157693,"group_id":"7578701148035484696","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"有好看的书一定要推荐给我啊，我很容易书荒的啊！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9Q/hyPtrfplhsAWuAWo4Sl0DMET31zzr31kwuZCOgK1","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1fc1316946334afeb560c979482ed7a7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615190&x-signature=BekVfM1RvUsjch3Hr9%2B%2FWaFQ6E0%3D","user_id":"4244576748182535","user_name":"沫的白"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4244576748182535","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7578701148035484696","book_info":{"abstract":"本书以时间为经纬，以案件为节点，系统梳理了八十年代至今四十余年来影响深远、家喻户晓的重大刑侦案件，既是一部震撼人心的案件纪实录，更是一幅中国刑侦技术迭代、法治建设完善的生动画卷。
书中收录的案件，既有1980年代“东北二王”案这样开启全国协查先河的恶性案件，也有1990年代“白宝山案”中展现的刑侦人员与悍匪的智勇博弈；既包含2000年代“马加爵案”背后对社会心理的深刻叩问，也囊括2010年代以后“湄公河惨案”这种跨国执法合作的经典范例。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/856768dd1adbffa757a517288a1daddf~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"文强","author_id":"","book_id":"7578701148035484696","book_name":"中国刑侦大案纪实","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"11.7万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7585476069067590681","read_count":"18026","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"83186"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"25","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/856768dd1adbffa757a517288a1daddf~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779256783&x-signature=k%2BQ5N3gp2PZC4swnhf1DZMt71CQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"10"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113594353D5A596BFA7EFEC369D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读39分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2345,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":791},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7594835623379272473","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真实的纪实刑侦小说，非常感谢作者的分享！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":176831
